nasb.text: Because of this I must lament and wail, I must go barefoot and naked; I must make a lament like the jackals And a mourning like the ostriches.

esv.text: For this I will lament and wail; I will go stripped and naked; I will make lamentation like the jackals, and mourning like the ostriches.

cnv.text: 為此我要痛哭哀號， 赤膊光腳而行； 又要哀號如豺狼， 悲鳴像鴕鳥。

ccb.text: 为此，我要痛哭哀号， 我要赤身光脚而行， 像豺狼哀嚎， 如鸵鸟悲鸣。
